steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The phrase "Comics by other Black cartoonists followed" signals that the blank should introduce an example of those later cartoonists.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the choices
steps.content:
The logical relationship is example: the passage states that other Black cartoonists followed Turner, and the next sentence names two specific cartoonists who did exactly that. The blank needs a transition signaling that the following sentence illustrates the preceding general claim.
  • "For instance,": signals a specific example of the preceding general statement, fitting perfectly — Jerry Craft and Charlos Gary are examples of the "other Black cartoonists" who followed. ✓
  • "However,": signals contrast, so fails — the named cartoonists confirm the claim, they do not contradict it. ✗
  • "Alternatively,": signals a different option or path, so fails — there is no alternative being offered. ✗
  • "Previously,": signals an earlier time, so fails — Craft and Gary came after Turner (1995 and 2001), not before. ✗
That matches the correct answer — A is correct.
